summary: Comprehensive testing of ClickFlow v3 completed successfully. All major features working correctly including authentication, theme system, search, assignment system, and bug attachments.
passed_tests: Registration link 'Need an account? Register here'
Search results showing tasks and bugs sections
User profile dropdown with all options (View Profile, Settings, Theme toggle, Sign Out)
Sprint board 'All' and 'Assigned to me' filter buttons
Bug list with status, priority, and assignee filter dropdowns
Bug detail panel with attachments section
Bug attachment via URL input functionality
All CRUD operations for projects, tasks, bugs, comments
